response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with nearly 20 years of experience and current involvement in AI infrastructure work, but lacks the demonstrated AI/ML products, strategic innovation leadership, and specialized AI credentials required for a director-level AI strategy role. Exceeds baseline engineering requirements but misses the specific AI expertise and platform-building experience the position emphasizes.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of diverse full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems with proven execution ability across multiple tech stacks
Founded GISCollective and maintains multiple open-source projects, demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative and ability to drive technical vision
Currently working on AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq with hands-on builder experience in AI tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms shipped—role requires 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' but resume shows infrastructure tools rather than AI solutions
Missing advanced AI/ML credentials (Master's or PhD in AI field)—background is CS without specialized AI training or certifications shown
Positioned as full-stack execution engineer rather than strategic innovation leader—no evidence of customer advisory work, platform direction-setting, or thought leadership on AI differentiation

key_factors.factor: Strategic innovation and customer advisory positioning
